reviews.comment:
Had a pretty average experience at Coffee Island Cafe in Phoenix Marketcity, Kurla.

The café has a nice look and the drinks were decent, but nothing stood out compared to other coffee spots in the mall. The coffee was okay, though not as bold or memorable as I hoped, and some food items felt a bit overpriced for what you get.

Service was friendly, but it was slightly slow. Overall it’s a decent place to grab a quick coffee if you’re at the mall, but I probably wouldn’t go out of my way for it.

reviews.comment: One of the best flatbreads I’ve ever tried! The taste was absolutely amazing and the thickness was just perfect. Everything about it was spot on. The serving style was very innovative, neat, and impressive. It was truly a lovely experience. Highly recommended! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviewReply.comment: Wonderful to hear the flatbread made such a great impression. Glad you enjoyed the flavours and the way it was served. Looking forward to welcoming you again soon.
